description_long: This is a sleek, modern military jet aircraft with a streamlined fuselage and a low-mounted, swept-back wing configuration. The exterior features a two-tone camouflage paint scheme in shades of gray and blue, with a prominent insignia of a white eagle on the vertical stabilizer. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a dark, tinted canopy, likely accommodating two seats in tandem. The aircraft is equipped with a tricycle landing gear, with the nose gear and main gear both visible and appearing retractable. Underwing pylons are present, suggesting the capability to carry external stores such as fuel tanks or ordnance. The tail section features a conventional single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, completing its agile and aggressive appearance.
description: A modern military jet with a two-tone camouflage scheme, swept low wings, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. Features include a single vertical stabilizer, tricycle landing gear, and underwing pylons.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the jet, the eagle insignia on the tail, and the tricycle landing gear.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the jet's engine exhaust, wing sweep, and the symmetry of the tail and wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the cockpit and underwing pylons.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and the full span of the swept wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle, retractable landing gear with one nose gear and two main gear units
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a tandem seating arrangement and a dark, streamlined canopy
